heading: Terms and Conditions
description: Welcome to Bright Light Immigration Services Inc ("we," "us," or "our"). These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our website and the services we provide as a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant. By accessing or using this website and our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
subHeadingDescription1: We are a licensed Canadian Immigration Consultant (RCIC) providing immigration consultation services to individuals seeking assistance with Canadian immigration processes. Our services include consultations, document preparation, submission of applications, and other related immigration services.
subHeadingDescription2: We will provide the services as per our agreement with you, which may include but is not limited to, consultation, document review, and representation before relevant immigration authorities. Please note that the outcome of any immigration application is at the sole discretion of the relevant government authorities. We do not and cannot guarantee the approval of any visa, status, or application.
subHeadingDescription3:
As a client, you agree to:

•	Provide accurate and complete information regarding your immigration application.

•	Cooperate fully with us in the preparation and submission of your application, including providing all necessary 
        documentation.

•	Respond promptly to our requests for information and maintain regular communication regarding your case.


Failure to comply with these responsibilities may result in delays, or application refusal for which we are not responsible.
subHeadingDescription4:
Our fees are for professional services rendered in accordance with the scope of work agreed upon. These fees are not contingent on the outcome of your application. In any case of disputes, the final decision making authority is Loveneet Paneswar.	

Non-Refundable Fees:

•	First Payment: The initial payment for services is non-refundable under all circumstances.
•	Application Refusal: No refunds will be issued if your application is refused by immigration authorities due to 
         false information, misrepresentation, fraud, medical or security inadmissibility, or failure to adhere to the 
         terms of the agreement. Additionally, no refunds will be issued if your application is withdrawn by you or 
         rejected due to your failure to satisfy the immigration officer regarding your qualifications or background.

                                Refund Requests Before Reaching a Milestone:

•	If you request a refund before a milestone, as defined in our retainer agreement, is reached, we will issue a 
        refund after deducting the amount equivalent to our hourly rate of $250.00 for the time already spent on your 
        file. This includes time spent on calls, emails, text messages, WhatsApp messages, and work completed on your 
        application.

•	A Refund Agreement must be signed by both you and us to initiate the refund process.

                                         Conditions of No Refund:

       We will not refund professional fees in the following circumstances:

•	If you do not cooperate in the submission of the application to immigration authorities.
•	If you withdraw your application at any stage of the process.
•	If your application is refused or rejected due to false information, fraud, or failure to meet legal 
        requirements.
•	If you withhold relevant information from us or the immigration authorities.
•	If you fail to comply with requests for additional documents or information during the processing of your 
        application.
subHeadingDescription5: We are not responsible for delays in processing times, application refusals, or other decisions made by Canadian immigration authorities. The immigration process is at the sole discretion of the relevant government authorities, and we cannot guarantee the outcome of any application.
subHeadingDescription6: Please note that Legally Canadian does not offer services to any countries that are subject to sanctions by Canada or the United States.
subHeadingDescription7: Please note that all content on www.legallycanadian.com is the intellectual property of Bright Light Immigration Services Inc. We do not permit copying, scraping, or otherwise using our content without our explicit permission, and we kindly ask you to respect that.
subHeadingDescription8: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Province of British Columbia and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein.
subHeadingDescription9: We reserve the right to update or amend these Terms and Conditions at any time without prior notice. Any changes will be effective upon posting to the website. It is your responsibility to review these Terms and Conditions periodically.
